howItWorks.title: How Datamız Works
howItWorks.description: Datamız connects organizations and independent researchers with verified contributors for surveys and one-to-one interviews. The platform helps product teams, marketing teams, and research professionals collect reliable data, insights, and expertise directly from people who match their target audience. By bringing participant discovery, screening, and compensation into one system, Datamız makes high-quality data collection simple and dependable.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account and fill in your demographics, education, region, and interests. This helps companies find you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Explore available surveys and interviews that match your profile. See earnings before you apply.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Apply to opportunities you're interested in. Once approved, complete surveys or attend interviews.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive payment directly to your wallet. Withdraw to your bank account or mobile money anytime.
howItWorks.compStep1Desc: Sign up and complete your company profile. Tell us about your organization and research needs.
howItWorks.compStep2Desc: Set specific demographic filters: age range, region, education, occupation, and more to reach the right audience.
howItWorks.compStep3Desc: Design your questionnaire or interview guide. Set compensation rates and deadlines.
howItWorks.compStep4Desc: Review applications from qualified contributors. Approve participants and monitor responses in real-time.
howItWorks.compStep5Desc: Access completed responses and analytics. Export data in your preferred format for deeper analysis.
howItWorks.fairCompensationDesc: Contributors are paid competitive rates for their time and participation in surveys and interviews.
howItWorks.highDataQualityDesc: The platform is designed to ensure reliable responses and reduce low-effort participation.

contributors.title: Earn Money Sharing Your Opinions
contributors.subtitle: Join thousands of local data owners who earn extra income by participating in research campaigns.
contributors.earnExtraIncomeDesc: Get paid for sharing your opinions. Earn competitive rates for surveys and interviews that match your profile.
contributors.flexibleScheduleDesc: Work whenever you want, wherever you are. Choose opportunities that fit your availability.
contributors.secureTrustedDesc: Your data is protected and payments are guaranteed. We ensure a safe and transparent platform.
contributors.shapeProductsDesc: Your insights help companies build better products and services for the emerging markets.
contributors.howToEarnSubtitle: Different types of opportunities with varying time commitments and compensation
contributors.completeProfileDesc: Add your demographics, education, occupation, and interests. The more complete your profile, the more opportunities you'll see.
contributors.surveysDesc: From quick polls to detailed questionnaires. Compensation depends on the length, complexity, and other advanced factors of each survey.
contributors.videoInterviewsDesc: One-to-one or group video conversations with researchers, usually 15 minutes or longer.
contributors.whoCanJoinSubtitle: Basic requirements to become a contributor on Datamız
contributors.completeProfileStepDesc: Add your details to get matched
contributors.faq1A: Earnings vary based on the type and length of surveys. Active contributors can earn $50–$300+ per month.
contributors.faq2A: Payments are processed within 48 hours of completing a survey. You can withdraw once you reach $3.
contributors.faq3A: It depends on your profile and current demand. Most contributors see new opportunities weekly.
contributors.faq4A: Yes! All your personal data is encrypted and we never share your identity with companies without consent.
contributors.analyticsSubtitle: Track your earnings, performance, and opportunities in real-time
contributors.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of local contributors and start earning shortly.

companies.title: Access Verified Data Samples
companies.subtitle: Collect structured responses from identity-verified participants in your target market.
companies.challengesSubtitle: Traditional data collection methods have significant limitations. Here's how Datamız addresses them.
companies.lowResponseRatesProblem: Traditional surveys struggle to reach target audiences
companies.lowResponseRatesSolution: Pre-qualified participants matched to your exact criteria
companies.unreliableDataProblem: Bot responses and fake accounts compromise data quality
companies.unreliableDataSolution: Identity-verified contributors, reputation-based participation, and automated response quality control
companies.slowTurnaroundProblem: Waiting weeks for enough responses delays decisions
companies.poorTargetingProblem: Generic surveys miss your specific demographic needs
companies.poorTargetingSolution: Filter by age, region, occupation, education, and more
companies.preciseTargetingDesc: Filter participants by demographics, location, education, occupation, income level, and interests to reach your exact audience.
companies.verifiedQualityDesc: All contributors undergo identity verification while automated systems monitor response quality and detect low-effort submissions.
companies.fastResultsDesc: Launch surveys and start receiving responses within hours. Most projects complete within 24–48 hours.
companies.actionableInsightsDesc: Real-time analytics dashboard, export capabilities, and detailed response tracking to drive business decisions.
companies.dataIntegritySubtitle: Datamız uses a multi-layer data integrity system to ensure organizations receive reliable insights from real people. Verification, participant screening, reputation tracking, proof of fit, and AI-powered response analysis work together to prevent fraudulent or low-quality participation.
companies.verifiedContributorsDesc: All contributors complete identity verification before joining the platform. This ensures responses come from real individuals rather than anonymous or automated accounts.
companies.applicationScreeningDesc: Participants apply to surveys and interviews, allowing organizations to review and approve contributors who best match their research criteria.
companies.reputationSystemDesc: Contributor performance and response quality are tracked over time. High-performing contributors gain stronger reputation scores and access to more research opportunities.
companies.proofOfFitDesc: When required, contributors may verify professional, demographic, or contextual information to confirm that they match the research requirements.
companies.aiQualityControlDesc: Automated systems detect low-effort responses, inconsistencies, and suspicious activity to maintain high-quality research data.
companies.targetingSubtitle: Reach exactly who you need with comprehensive demographic and behavioral filters
companies.marketResearchDesc: Test product concepts, understand customer preferences, and validate market opportunities before launch.
companies.customerSatisfactionDesc: Gather feedback from your customer segments to improve products, services, and customer experience.
companies.brandPerceptionDesc: Measure brand awareness, sentiment, and positioning against competitors in emerging markets.
companies.productTestingDesc: Get detailed feedback on prototypes, features, and user experience from your target demographics.
companies.policyPublicOpinionDesc: Understand public sentiment on social, economic, and policy issues across different segments.
companies.employeeInsightsDesc: Conduct anonymous workplace surveys to improve organizational culture and employee satisfaction.
companies.processStep1Desc: Create the company account and provide your research needs.
companies.processStep2Desc: Set demographic filters to reach the right participants.
companies.processStep3Desc: Build your questionnaire or interview guide.
companies.processStep4Desc: Define participant compensation and launch your research.
companies.processStep5Desc: Access responses, insights, and export data for further analysis.
companies.pricingSubtitle: Pay only for completed responses. No subscription fees or hidden costs.
companies.pricingNote: Price depends on survey length, complexity, and targeting criteria.
companies.pricingNote2: Custom pricing available for large-scale projects and ongoing research partnerships.
companies.analyticsSubtitle: Monitor your research campaigns with comprehensive analytics and insights
companies.ctaSubtitle: Start collecting targeted data from screened, identity-verified participants.

earlyAdopters.title: Featured Companies
earlyAdopters.alatDesc: Saudi Arabian smart-building and advanced technology manufacturer leading large-scale infrastructure solutions.
earlyAdopters.kapitalDesc: One of Azerbaijan's largest and most innovative banks.
earlyAdopters.pashaDesc: Premier life insurance provider with modern customer-centric approach.
earlyAdopters.korponDesc: Corporate training and development solutions provider.
earlyAdopters.inkYouDesc: Design and branding agency creating memorable brand experiences.
earlyAdopters.directAccessDesc: Connect directly with respondents instead of purchasing expensive pre-collected datasets. Launch research campaigns and gather insights straight from the source.
earlyAdopters.singlePlatformDesc: Run surveys and conduct one-to-one interviews in the same platform. Collect measurable data and deeper insights without switching between multiple research tools.
earlyAdopters.sabahLabDesc: Datamız is a graduate of the SABAH.lab startup incubation program supporting the development of innovative technology ventures.
earlyAdopters.testimonialQuote: "Datamız is exactly what Azerbaijan's market research landscape needs. The ability to target specific demographics with verified contributors saves us time and gives us confidence in our data quality."

about.title: About Datamız
about.subtitle: Building revolutionary data marketplace
about.missionText: Datamız connects contributors who want to earn money by sharing their insights with companies that need high-quality, targeted data to make better business decisions. We're building a transparent, efficient marketplace that creates value for everyone.
about.qualityDataDesc: Verified contributors ensure authentic, reliable responses
about.fairMarketplaceDesc: Transparent pricing and fair compensation for all
about.localFocusDesc: Built specifically for the emerging markets
about.sabahText: Datamız is proud to be part of the SABAH Lab Incubation Program, receiving mentorship, resources, and support as we build Azerbaijan's leading data marketplace platform.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Be among the first to access Datamız when we launch. Limited spots available for our beta program.
waitlist.commentsPlaceholder: Tell us about your interest in Datamız or specific needs...
waitlist.disclaimer: By joining, you agree to receive updates about Datamız. You can unsubscribe at any time.
waitlist.successMessage: Thank you for joining the Datamız waitlist. We'll reach out soon with early access details and updates on our launch.
waitlist.learnMorePrompt: In the meantime, learn more about how Datamız works:
waitlist.earlyAccessBenefitDesc: Beta testers get priority access and special features
waitlist.noCommitmentDesc: Join the waitlist with no obligation to use the platform
waitlist.stayUpdatedDesc: Get exclusive updates on our progress and launch
waitlist.toastDescription: We'll be in touch soon with early access details.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using Datamız, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.section2Text: Permission is granted to temporarily access the materials on Datamız for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.section3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your account.
terms.section4Text: By using our platform, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.section5Text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at datamizaz@gmail.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including name, email address, phone number, and demographic information.
privacy.section2Text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to protect our users.
privacy.section3Text: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy or with your consent.
privacy.section4Text: We take reasonable measures to help protect your personal information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access.
privacy.section5Text: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time by contacting us.
privacy.section6Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at datamizaz@gmail.com

footer.tagline: Connecting contributors and companies for high-quality local insights.
